blocks.content: em3k uses two types of configuration files to control behavior:
Root config.json: Controls app-wide settings like branding, features (quizzing, certificates, logging), and which lesson to load by default.
Lesson manifest.json: Each lesson folder contains a manifest that defines the lesson structure, number of pages, quiz settings, and metadata.
This separation allows lessons to be truly modular and portable. You can copy an entire lesson folder to another em3k installation and it will work immediately.
